fields.label:
Location and travel- 
This role is based in San Francisco or Los Angeles with 25–40% travel to customer sites. Which best describes you?
	•	Currently in SF/LA and open to that travel cadence
	•	Willing to relocate to SF/LA within 60 days
	•	Not open to either
Point us to one thing you’ve personally shipped to production that used LLMs, generative models, or real-time AI. A repo, a demo link, a blog post, a loom, or 2–3 sentences is all we need.
fields.value:
I'm excited about the opportunity to work at HeyGen because I'm drawn to organizations that operate at scale, solve complex technical challenges, and prioritize innovation and long-term impact. Throughout my experience at Microsoft and Amazon Robotics, I've enjoyed working at the intersection of technology, operations, and strategy — leading cross-functional initiatives, building scalable systems, and driving measurable business outcomes.

What particularly interests me about HeyGen is the opportunity to contribute to high-impact products and programs while collaborating with talented teams across engineering, product, and business functions. I'm especially motivated by environments where I can combine technical depth with program leadership to improve reliability, automation, and operational efficiency.

In my current role, I've led large-scale resilience and automation initiatives, developed AI-driven workflow solutions, and managed complex cross-organizational programs under executive visibility. I enjoy taking ambiguous problems, creating structure, and driving execution from concept through delivery. I'd be excited to bring that same mindset to HeyGen while continuing to grow in a fast-paced and innovative environment.

Beyond the technical challenges, I'm also looking for a company whose culture emphasizes ownership, collaboration, and continuous improvement. From what I've seen, HeyGen aligns strongly with those values, which makes the opportunity especially compelling to me.

fields.label: In the last 2 years, what’s the largest enterprise deployment you personally owned end-to-end (scoping through production)? Please provide one sentence on the customer type, one on what you shipped, one on the outcome.
